description: A visitor planning a trip to a botanical garden wants to know about parking availability and cost.

nodes.task_description: Identify the attraction (botanical garden) and the query (parking).
Retrieve parking information from the attraction's knowledge base.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that there is an on-site parking garage that costs $15 per day.

nodes.task_description: Communicate the parking details, including location and cost, to the visitor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly provides the correct parking information.
